audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a neutral tone and moderate pace, discussing night vision goggles and someone following another person, with no notable background sounds.
temporal_description: A man and a woman are seated on a white couch in a living room. The man, wearing a dark blue shirt with a horizontal stripe and beige pants, sits with his hands clasped in his lap, looking slightly to his right. The woman, dressed in a white blouse and blue pleated pants, sits beside him with her hands resting on her lap, her gaze directed forward. Behind them, another person stands with their hands on the back of the couch, partially visible. The room features a wooden coffee table with a few items on it, a patterned rug, and a lamp on a side table. In a separate shot, a blonde woman in a patterned blouse stands in front of a wooden cabinet with a television and decorative statues on top, gesturing with her hands as she speaks.
